feedback.text: Hello! I'm here from Norway to support the idea of adding a sixth item adjacent to the proposal! I'd love to see the suggested policies from the grassroots movement StopKillingGames to be inlcuded here, as it would lead to great protections for consumers who've bought a game and be protected from publishers completely deactivating it. The wiki on StopKillingGames explains the position best! Thank you for your time!
